features.name: top_level_inout_port_with_enable
features.description: Code should include a top-level module with inout (bidirectional) port that is conditionally driven based on an enable signal

features.name: tristate_bus_with_z_assignment
features.description: Code should include an assign statement that drives a bus to high-impedance (z) when disabled and to a data value when enabled

features.name: reading_inout_port_in_expression
features.description: Code should include reading from an inout port within an expression to compute a result

features.name: tri_net_type_for_bidirectional_bus
features.description: Code should include a tri net declaration for a bidirectional bus that is conditionally driven
